'''zhasaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyamancha|kyamancha]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-s-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyamancha|kyamancha]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhasaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæsæbæth|zhæsæbæth]] || [[word:zhæsæbæj|zhæsæbæj]] || [[word:zhæsæbæsh|zhæsæbæsh]] || [[word:zhæsæbæ|zhæsæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhasasabath|zhasasabath]] || [[word:zhasasabaj|zhasasabaj]] || [[word:zhasasabash|zhasasabash]] || [[word:zhasasaba|zhasasaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhasabath|zhasabath]] || [[word:zhasabaj|zhasabaj]] || [[word:zhasabash|zhasabash]] || [[word:zhasaba|zhasaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhasafbath|zhasafbath]] || [[word:zhasafbaj|zhasafbaj]] || [[word:zhasafbash|zhasafbash]] || [[word:zhasafbaf|zhasafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhasabatha|zhasabatha]] || [[word:zhasabaja|zhasabaja]] || [[word:zhasabasha|zhasabasha]] || [[word:zhasabaka|zhasabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhasabath|zhasabath]] || [[word:zhasabaj|zhasabaj]] || [[word:zhasabash|zhasabash]] || [[word:zhasaba|zhasaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhasabathal|zhasabathal]] || [[word:zhasabajal|zhasabajal]] || [[word:zhasabashal|zhasabashal]] || [[word:zhasabakal|zhasabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhasabathatha|zhasabathatha]] || [[word:zhasabajaja|zhasabajaja]] || [[word:zhasabashasha|zhasabashasha]] || [[word:zhasabaka|zhasabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhasabathan|zhasabathan]] || [[word:zhasabajan|zhasabajan]] || [[word:zhasabashan|zhasabashan]] || [[word:zhasabakan|zhasabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhasabathaoro|zhasabathaoro]] || [[word:zhasabajaoro|zhasabajaoro]] || [[word:zhasabashaoro|zhasabashaoro]] || [[word:zhasabakaoro|zhasabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
